name: Oriental Hamburger Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 ½ oz Can cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the meat into a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until the meat is browned. Stir after half of the cooking time.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the meat mixture.
3. Cover and heat in the Microwave Oven for 20 minutes or until the mixture is hot. Uncover and heat for an additional 5 minutes.
